query: SELECT id, name, email, company, phone, industry, lead_source, call_track, call_duration_seconds, conversation_id, conversation_summary, pain_points, wants, current_solutions, lead_brief, diagnostic_snapshot, status, email_status, created_at FROM leads WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%jjinco%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%jinco%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%jjinco%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%jinco%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
